name: email-connect
description: A standalone Gmail and Microsoft Graph mail simulation harness with first-class HTTP facades and embeddable SDK surfaces.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@email-connect/core && npm run build --workspace=@email-connect/gmail && npm run build --workspace=@email-connect/graph && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.check: npm run build --workspace=@email-connect/core && npm run check --workspace=@email-connect/core && npm run check --workspace=@email-connect/gmail && npm run check --workspace=@email-connect/graph && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist coverage packages/core/dist packages/gmail/dist packages/graph/dist
